full_text: Ashwin to Shanto, Litton Das Run Out!! 1 run completed. Drama and more drama now. Litton Das is run out and . Makes his anger known at both of them as he leaves still seething. This was flicked to deep mid-wicket by Shanto after coming down the track, Shanto wanted the second and Das was slow, even a full-length dive is not enough as KL hits direct from the deep. He is pumped as are the Indians. A brilliant piece of fielding sends Das back. Will that be the turning point of the game?  Replays show that Das stumbled when he turned for the 2nd and that was the pivotal moment, cost him a second and eventually proved to be the difference. Otherwise would've been touch and go with that dive of his.
